input.content:
name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: "Commit-log fixture to use (feat | fix | breaking | none)"
        required: false
        default: "feat"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  BUN_VERSION: "1.3.11"
  # Default to the "feat" fixture; the test harness overrides this via env in
  # `act -e <event.json>` or by writing fixtures/commits.txt before running act.
  FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'feat' }}

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Compute next semantic version
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install bun
        run: |
          curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v${BUN_VERSION}"
          echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Show bun version
        run: bun --version

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: bun test

      - name: Pick commit-log fixture
        id: fixture
        run: |
          # Test harness can pre-place fixtures/commits.txt to override the choice;
          # otherwise we copy the named built-in fixture.
          if [ ! -f fixtures/commits.txt ]; then
            cp "fixtures/commits-${FIXTURE}.txt" fixtures/commits.txt
          fi
          echo "Using fixture:"
          cat fixtures/commits.txt

      - name: Run semantic version bumper
        id: bump
        run: |
          bun run src/cli.ts \
            --version-file package.json \
            --commit-log fixtures/commits.txt \
            --changelog CHANGELOG.md \
            --date 2026-05-07

      - name: Print resulting version
        run: |
          echo "previous_version=${{ steps.bump.outputs.previous_version }}"
          echo "new_version=${{ steps.bump.outputs.new_version }}"
          echo "bump=${{ steps.bump.outputs.bump }}"
          echo "RESULT::previous=${{ steps.bump.outputs.previous_version }}::new=${{ steps.bump.outputs.new_version }}::bump=${{ steps.bump.outputs.bump }}"

      - name: Show updated package.json
        run: cat package.json

      - name: Show changelog (head)
        run: |
          if [ -f CHANGELOG.md ]; then
            head -n 40 CHANGELOG.md
          else
            echo "(no CHANGELOG.md written)"
          fi

name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: "Commit-log fixture to use (feat | fix | breaking | none)"
        required: false
        default: "feat"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  BUN_VERSION: "1.3.11"
  # Default to the "feat" fixture; the test harness overrides this via env in
  # `act -e <event.json>` or by writing fixtures/commits.txt before running act.
  FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'feat' }}

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Compute next semantic version
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install bun
        run: |
          curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v${BUN_VERSION}"
          echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Show bun version
        run: bun --version

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: bun test

      - name: Pick commit-log fixture
        id: fixture
        run: |
          # Test harness can pre-place fixtures/commits.txt to override the choice;
          # otherwise we copy the named built-in fixture.
          if [ ! -f fixtures/commits.txt ]; then
            cp "fixtures/commits-${FIXTURE}.txt" fixtures/commits.txt
          fi
          echo "Using fixture:"
          cat fixtures/commits.txt

      - name: Run semantic version bumper
        id: bump
        run: |
          bun run src/cli.ts \
            --version-file package.json \
            --commit-log fixtures/commits.txt \
            --changelog CHANGELOG.md \
            --date 2026-05-07

      - name: Print resulting version
        run: |
          echo "previous_version=${{ steps.bump.outputs.previous_version }}"
          echo "new_version=${{ steps.bump.outputs.new_version }}"
          echo "bump=${{ steps.bump.outputs.bump }}"
          echo "RESULT::previous=${{ steps.bump.outputs.previous_version }}::new=${{ steps.bump.outputs.new_version }}::bump=${{ steps.bump.outputs.bump }}"

      - name: Show updated package.json
        run: cat package.json

      - name: Show changelog (head)
        run: |
          if [ -f CHANGELOG.md ]; then
            head -n 40 CHANGELOG.md
          else
            echo "(no CHANGELOG.md written)"
          fi

name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: "Commit-log fixture to use (feat | fix | breaking | none)"
        required: false
        default: "feat"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  BUN_VERSION: "1.3.11"
  # Default to the "feat" fixture; the test harness overrides this via env in
  # `act -e <event.json>` or by writing fixtures/commits.txt before running act.
  FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'feat' }}

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Compute next semantic version
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install bun
        run: |
          curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v${BUN_VERSION}"
          echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Show bun version
        run: bun --version

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: bun test

      - name: Pick commit-log fixture
        id: fixture
        run: |
          # Test harness can pre-place fixtures/commits.txt to override the choice;
          # otherwise we copy the named built-in fixture.
          if [ ! -f fixtures/commits.txt ]; then
            cp "fixtures/commits-${FIXTURE}.txt" fixtures/commits.txt
          fi
          echo "Using fixture:"
          cat fixtures/commits.txt

      - name: Run semantic version bumper
        id: bump
        run: |
          bun run src/cli.ts \
            --version-file package.json \
            --commit-log fixtures/commits.txt \
            --changelog CHANGELOG.md \
            --date 2026-05-07

      - name: Print resulting version
        run: |
          echo "previous_version=${{ steps.bump.outputs.previous_version }}"
          echo "new_version=${{ steps.bump.outputs.new_version }}"
          echo "bump=${{ steps.bump.outputs.bump }}"
          echo "RESULT::previous=${{ steps.bump.outputs.previous_version }}::new=${{ steps.bump.outputs.new_version }}::bump=${{ steps.bump.outputs.bump }}"

      - name: Show updated package.json
        run: cat package.json

      - name: Show changelog (head)
        run: |
          if [ -f CHANGELOG.md ]; then
            head -n 40 CHANGELOG.md
          else
            echo "(no CHANGELOG.md written)"
          fi

lines: +        # Limit to unit tests; tests/act.test.ts + tests/workflow.test.ts are
+        # for the host harness and need `act`/`actionlint`, neither of which
+        # is present inside the act container.

- `1.1.0 -> 1.2.0` (feat → minor) ✓
- `1.4.2 -> 2.0.0` (breaking → major) ✓
- `0.5.0 -> 0.5.1` (fix → patch) ✓

content.text:
Done. Final summary:

**What was built (TDD red→green for each piece):**
- `src/semver.ts` — parse/format/bump (1.2.3 → 1.2.4 / 1.3.0 / 2.0.0)
- `src/commits.ts` — Conventional Commits parser + bump-kind selector (`feat`→minor, `fix`→patch, `!`/`BREAKING CHANGE:`→major)
- `src/changelog.ts` — Markdown entry generator with breaking/features/fixes/etc. sections
- `src/versionFile.ts` — read/write `package.json` (preserving other fields) or plain `VERSION` files
- `src/cli.ts` — orchestrator (`runBump`) + CLI entrypoint that writes outputs to `$GITHUB_OUTPUT`
- `fixtures/commits-{feat,fix,breaking,none}.txt` — test fixtures

**Workflow + harness:**
- `.github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml` — `actions/checkout@v4`, installs Bun, runs unit tests, picks fixture, runs the bumper, prints a `RESULT::previous=…::new=…::bump=…` marker; passes `actionlint`.
- `tests/workflow.test.ts` — parses YAML, asserts triggers/jobs/permissions/script paths, runs `actionlint` (exit 0).
- `tests/act.test.ts` — for each of 3 cases (feat/breaking/fix) sets up a temp repo, runs `act push --rm --pull=false`, appends output to `act-result.txt`, and asserts exact expected `new_version`/`bump`/`Job succeeded`/exit code 0.

**Results:** 51 tests pass across 7 files (`bun test`). All 3 act runs exit 0, all jobs report success, and the workflow emits the exact expected versions: `1.1.0→1.2.0` (feat), `1.4.2→2.0.0` (breaking), `0.5.0→0.5.1` (fix). `act-result.txt` is 55 KB with all three cases delimited.

result:
Done. Final summary:

**What was built (TDD red→green for each piece):**
- `src/semver.ts` — parse/format/bump (1.2.3 → 1.2.4 / 1.3.0 / 2.0.0)
- `src/commits.ts` — Conventional Commits parser + bump-kind selector (`feat`→minor, `fix`→patch, `!`/`BREAKING CHANGE:`→major)
- `src/changelog.ts` — Markdown entry generator with breaking/features/fixes/etc. sections
- `src/versionFile.ts` — read/write `package.json` (preserving other fields) or plain `VERSION` files
- `src/cli.ts` — orchestrator (`runBump`) + CLI entrypoint that writes outputs to `$GITHUB_OUTPUT`
- `fixtures/commits-{feat,fix,breaking,none}.txt` — test fixtures

**Workflow + harness:**
- `.github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml` — `actions/checkout@v4`, installs Bun, runs unit tests, picks fixture, runs the bumper, prints a `RESULT::previous=…::new=…::bump=…` marker; passes `actionlint`.
- `tests/workflow.test.ts` — parses YAML, asserts triggers/jobs/permissions/script paths, runs `actionlint` (exit 0).
- `tests/act.test.ts` — for each of 3 cases (feat/breaking/fix) sets up a temp repo, runs `act push --rm --pull=false`, appends output to `act-result.txt`, and asserts exact expected `new_version`/`bump`/`Job succeeded`/exit code 0.

**Results:** 51 tests pass across 7 files (`bun test`). All 3 act runs exit 0, all jobs report success, and the workflow emits the exact expected versions: `1.1.0→1.2.0` (feat), `1.4.2→2.0.0` (breaking), `0.5.0→0.5.1` (fix). `act-result.txt` is 55 KB with all three cases delimited.
